I previuosly wrote "I am on the fence about Deppman." After writing that short review last year, I stopped in to the office to make a payment and the clerk said "Oh, I thought you were here to yell at me." (due to my 3 star review!).  The review was, and still is very fair!

I found Lesley to be slow to respond, if she responded at all to my emails and in person inquiries. In over a year working together I never once met Lesley, though I stopped in to the office approximately 10 times to make payment, drop of paperwork etc.. She was always 'at lunch, in a meeting, on the phone, and so on.' While the case may have been small to Deppmann, it was vitally important to my life. A little effort on Lesley' part would have meant a lot. If I had still been residing in Texas or California I would have fired Lesley in a hot minute. Unfortunately there is not much competition in the eviction business locally. With more competition their office would be much quicker and more responsive or they would lose a lot of customers.

Aside from filings that went smoothly, the most appreciated part of our interactions came when I asked how long the eviction would take, and Lesley very hoestly replied 'the end of next summer.' That was her estimate in the fall, and I appreciated the honesty.  Shocking, but honest. The tenant left shortly before our court date thank God, because it was about to get expensive in court.

A word about court service here in Middlebury: I firmly beleive that my tenant would not have gotten served court papers except for the fact that I did my own research and found out the tenant worked about 150 yards North of the Sheriff's station on Court St. I send a recent photo of the tenant and told them where to find her, approximately when she would be there and where to locate her at work. It is ludicroud that in VT. only an overburdened Sheriff can serve court papers to a defendant.  The workplace is less than 1/2 mile from Deppman. Is it really true that only the Sheriff could serve her?? Coudn't any court appointed officer? If that information is true, then that is a huge flaw in the court process in VT.

In the end we succeeded in getting the tenant out 1.5 years after I first sent a letter to vacate. The process is exhaustively slow here in VT.  That is not Deppmann's fault, and perhaps their office is slow to respond because they know that the case will take an inordinate amout of time. I am not sure of their motivations, but I stand by my intial rating of 3-stars.

Lawyers are good writers. I challenge Deppmann to dispute anything in this review. It is all factually accurate and a fair review.

I hate leaving negative reviews - it’s someone’s business, after all. That said…
My realtor highly recommended Deppman, who agreed to do my closing. Little hiccups along the way, probably to be expected. Closing was awful. Three days before closing I talked to him and he was unaware his staff had scheduled closing. Then he forgot I had signed POA for him  to represent me. He did not follow thru on basic tasks. For example, he requested a final water/sewer reading from the Town and did not receive one. Instead of following up, he closed…and without escrowing funds or letting me know. When I contacted him after receiving a bill from the Town more than 2 months after selling the property, he said  (in writing) ‘we didn’t hear from them the Town), so we went head and closed’.  The buyers’ attny didn’t notice state required fire/CO detectors were missing on the walkthru. Deppman noticed, but wanted to close, so didn’t mention it. Later, he refused to accept responsibility, but added  (also in writing) ‘mistakes were made’. These were not mistakes. These were either incompetence  or greed, since there was no error in him collecting his fees. Stear clear.
reviews.ownerResponse: I agree there were mistakes made, but this review is not an accurate representation of what happened.  The mistake is that the town did not provide us with the water/sewer reading and the buyer's attorney did not request the information.  So, after closing, a bill for water and sewer came for water and sewer usage that occurred prior to closing. This seller refused to pay that bill, even though it was for services she used. I did not refuse to accept responsibility, this reviewer did.  The reviewer did not pay the invoice.  A lot of the rest of what was written in this review does not even relate to my performance or anything I'd been involved in.  If we'd delayed closing, my fees would likely have increased for more work performed, so that comment does not make sense to me.  As always, I am happy to discuss my services with any current, former, or prospective clients.

During our closing, Joy and her team were friendly, efficient, and helpful.  They answered all our questions as they arose and our closing went super smoothly.

Joy Karnes Limoge, Esq and her team did an excellent job with our house purchase/closing process.  She responded to all questions we had prior to the closing date quickly and professionally.  On the day of closing we were greeted warmly and the whole experience was positive.  We highly recommend this law firm to handle your real estate needs.

We feel very fortunate to have Joy on our team.   She and her office are wonderful to work with.
This being our first time going through the endeavor of buying a home, we had quite a few unknowns that we didn't know how to handle. (We didn't know what we didn't know!)
We were able to buy our first home, and having her support and knowing everything was done correctly (Invaluable) made the whole process a great experience.
Thank you Joy!
Joy and her team were great to work with! She and her team thoroughly explained confusing parts. They were on the ball and got the job done smoothly.
Great to work with!

Joy was wonderful to work with! Had a slight hiccup in our home closing but she was on top of the issue and smoothed things over in no time. We really appreciated how responsive she was to any concerns we had. Will absolutely be using her services in the future!

I urge every one of my clients to use Joy and her team every chance I get.  She does an amazing job and I can feel confident in knowing that she will take care of them from the title search to closing and any legal questions or hurdles in between.  She's earned my business time and time again, and I highly recommend using Joy for any real estate related needs.

Deciding on a lawyer to use involves the obvious, legal credentials, time in business, areas of expertise, etc. Joy has all these in spades. But it is the subtler traits that make all the difference in your legal experience. Joy’s ability to listen closely, make you feel like the most important person in her day, her suggestions, and her efficiency without rushing anything. Her assistant Tory will often put his head on your knee to comfort you. Did I mention Tory is an amazing dog/advisor? Joy recently helped my wife and I with a will and some issues with complex family trusts, what an eye opener to a lay person like myself. Joy is my attorney for my future legal needs and I highly recommend her.

Joy is wonderful.  I have worked with her on two separate transactions and she has always been responsive, helpful and thorough. Her fees have always been reasonable and answers questions, no matter how trivial.  In short, I highly recommended her.

We would highly recommend Joy - have worked with her on a number of occassions for different needs and she has always been very accommodating and insightful. She has also provided quick legal advice without charging or requiring an appointment which is unusual but very much appreciated.

He was rude ,didn't like the way I told him things.
Very unprofessional.
Fantastic down to earth straight talk service. Mr. Brazil has become our lawyer for all civic needs.
Good lawyer right down to business
Unimpeachable integrity. Highly recommended

I would give 0 stars if I could. Hiring this man to represent me was one of the biggest mistakes of my life. He was uninterested and unprepared on the day of court. I asked about printing evidence of conversations from my phone to help prove my case and he said it wasn’t necessary. I believe that’s what lost my case.
Honest and straight forward
He tell's it like it is. Follow's through, and works hard.
He sucks

Hasn't called client i. Jail has been there for almost a year waiting for a call back for "2days" and its been 5 months. Tried calling from the jail e mailing and wrighting no reply, even have her cell phone number!! Where are you!??
The worst criminal lawyer there is I wouldn't recommend her to my dog...
Poor excuse of criminal defense lawyer
She did a great job with my son.. very caring person.. we were very thankful to  have her😁

My brother with who I served several years with both stateside and in Iraq I am starting to feel may have been taken advantage of in a desperate situation after talking to his biological brother. I check in with him regularly after he was accused of assault in which if he tells me it was self defense then I have no reason to doubt him and according to his brother he hasn't heard anything from his lawyer in months. Why is that? The man said they were doing another investigation and supposably nobody talked to him again. I know he is stressing out and it has impacted him both physically and mentally. He is a different person and I have him known him for over 30 years. Help the man out not just because he paid you but because it's the right thing to do!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much for reaching out and bringing this to our attention. Please have your friend contact us so we can resolve any issues. Thank you again.

reviews.text:
Took an incredibly Dark and terrible situation and gave me the lightest outcome , hard work , attention to detail and really handles any BS in tremendous fashion . Forever thankful for the service ! Worth every penny and then some , save yourself the hassle and give them a call with your legal matter's as you will not be disappointed .

Thanks again to the whole group at the firm !

I would highly recommend Addison and the team from handy law . Very thorough, honest, knowledgeable individuals in the respected fields. Addison was awesome with communication and handled everything very professionally.

I can’t say enough good things about Handy Law Firm, and especially Addison. From the very beginning, Addison was professional, knowledgeable, and truly cared about my case. He took the time to explain every step of the process, answered all of my questions, and gave me confidence when I needed it most.

Because of Addison’s hard work, dedication, and expertise, my case was resolved with a complete dismissal of charges. The outcome was better than I could have hoped for, and it’s clear it wouldn’t have been possible without his skill and persistence.

If you’re looking for an attorney who will fight for you and treat you with respect, I highly recommend Addison and Handy Law Firm. They turned a very stressful situation into one with a positive ending, and I am extremely grateful.

If you are looking for the most honest and caring lawyers, look no further!   I felt at home as soon as I walked in there.  Very smart and kind attorneys!  I
worked with Addison.  I can not say enough good things about him.   He has restored my faith in law.   Besides being brilliant, he is empathetic, a great communicator and works really hard to help his clients succeed, because he genuinely cares.  What more would you ask of a lawyer?
Highly recommend the team at Handy Law for any legal help!

Jordan, Addison, and Leah were great. I had a complicated and embarrassing case, which they were able to assist me with quickly and professionally. They took their time and went through everything in detail which was very appreciated. They made me feel as comfortable and as confident as possible. If I ever need a lawyer again they will be the first ones I call. I can definitely recommend them!

My faith has been restored!
The day is June 06, 2025. That is a Friday that I will never forget for a very long time. It's the middle of the day, and I'm running errands with my family when the phone rings. It was Addison Culupa from Handy Law. He gave me the best news I have been waiting to hear!
Addison had been working hard to fight for me in this case involving my family. After reviewing the information, he immediately identified all the misrepresented testimony and pushed to bring this injustice to light. That is exactly what he did. I am forever grateful to Addison and the entire team at Handy Law for this day. There is still more work to be done, but the difficult part has been eliminated as a result of the professionalism, understanding, and perseverance of one Addison Culupa. He is completely and unequivocally grace under pressure, and I truly appreciated that. If you're looking, don't hesitate, Addison at Handy Law has what it takes to win!

Handy Law did an amazing job with my case and got it completely dismissed! Great people and very professional I wouldn't recommend anyone else! They truly helped save my career and lifestyle! Thank you!
Everyone was super nice and were super helpful and got everything dismissed. Would recommend

This law firm went above my expectations. From the very beginning when I called thinking to leave a message after hours Jordan picked up the phone with less than two rings which caught me off guard. He explain to me great detail on what his law firm offers, which I had to think over. I did decide to go with Handy law firm and when I called to let the firm know I had more information for the case, Handy answered my call when he was on vacation! The whole law firm made me feel like they were my personal body guards. They understood my case and gave me the best outcome anyone could ask for. The case was dismissed!
Holly Carter and Attorney Handy were both very helpful in answering questions I had on a case they worked with me on almost six years ago!

If I were to recommend a dv attorney in Vermont it would 100% be Jordan Handy. My boyfriend had a very complex case; with him already being on probation and having a hefty sentence on his back, picking up domestic charges made it so much harder to fight for his innocence. In Vermont, women hold a lot of power so when he was charged Jordan didn’t sugar coat anything and not only prepared us for the uphill battle that was ahead but also made sure he took every necessary step to ensure we would get the best outcome we could in the situation we were in. I cannot stress enough how hard the state was fighting to put my boyfriend behind bars and Jordan still managed to get the case dropped without having to go to trial. I don’t know where my boyfriend would be if it hadn’t have been for hiring Jordan so if you’re looking for the most able attorney for similar charges don’t hesitate to contact Handy Law.
We have recently used Handy's Law to handle 2 of of our cases and the team was extremely help, responsive and knowledgeable. Would definitely use them in the future again if needed.
I've had many charges put on me because the cop didn't like me.   Jordan has got more than 5 cases dismissed for me and he's easy to work with.

Dedicated group of professionals who diligently fight for their clients every step of the way. Extremely glad that I called them. Jordan has assembled an excellent team, as Addison, Lea, and Holly are incredibly responsive and considerate. Simply the best.
Listen to your needs, attentive,  persistent, and great communication. The best out come possible.

Maureen is a godsend. Everything she did for me and my daughter cannot be overstated. Her knowledge of family law is astounding. If you want the best possible outcome for yourself and your family, I highly recommend going with Maureen
Maureen helped me through a very complex and emotional case in 2019-2020, and I am so grateful for her. She is professional and I felt confident having her by my side.
Very experienced and capable. Excellent, ethical representation.
Most unprofessional and childish adult I have met in a long time. She is insulting, condescending, and in 5 months hasn't returned one of my phone calls or emails.
Very very nice lady! She knows her stuff+++

Attorney Martin is absolutely amazing!  I feel that she went above and beyond for me and my case.  She is very sincere, honest, and works hard for you.  I was treated with respect and professionalism.  If your looking for a trustworthy lawyer who will fight for you then she is the one.  If I was a billionaire and I had to go to family court again I would still choose her over any other attorney.  She really cares for her clients and has the knowledge and skill to give them the best possible outcome.

I was going to hire Attorney Brown. I called to speak to him and arrange payment. His secretary is his wife. She was rude to me when I called and asked to speak to him. She told me that he spoke to me once and that was all I should expect. She stated it was because I hadn't even hired him yet. Well, you should give people the opportunity to hire you before being rude. Actually, I am very glad you let me know what I would be dealing with when I wanted to speak to my attorney.

I would recommend not hiring Harley to represent you. I was having to be the one to set up times to meet or discuss my case even calling an hour before a court date after not hearing anything for a month from him. Said my case had overwhelming evidence and did not go my way at all. Did not come prepared with any material I had given him and the material he did have he kept getting incorrect to the judge.

Friendly, prompt, capable, and SMART!
Harley knew just what I needed to do, and we took care of everything in a minimal amount of time.
Takes advantage of the system and the small people wanting justice!
Well knowledged in family & criminal law. Very friendly and supportive staff. Paralegal and investigators on Mr.Brown's staff that work very diligently to ensure the proper results.
Wife/staff was rude and unprofessional to passers-by in the town
Very good lawyer straight to the point
He is an amazing lawyer and person.

Doesn't return phone calls, 3 different times he called my brother to say he was being realeased and all were lies. Does whatever state wants to do. If your innocent and wanna stay that way use anyone else.. staff is wife and family and just as rude and none professional.

Harley Brown and his staff have represented my wife and I on two separate occasions in financial matters.  They were responsive and I am confident they represented our best interests at all times.  I always recommend this office to anyone looking for legal help in the Burlington area of Vermont.

We agree with Sherry!  We have used Jack McCamley's services for 13 or 14 real estate closings involving 5 or 6 different properties over the past 30+ years. These include purchases, sales, and refinancings, as well as a unique second mortgage situation. We have had only top notch service from Jack and his staff. We recommend him without reservation.

We've used this office for so many closings now I can barely keep track. I think it's 10 now. (We should get a punch card at this point) Jack McCamley & his "right hand" Jane are always on the ball getting things done right and on time!
Hopefully we won't ever find ourselves in legal trouble or divorce court but if so, I'd want Matt Branchaud representing me!
it's mind boggling how rude the staff is.
Helping to close more homes in Rutland County

My name is Thomas Harbison with my aunt and uncle Elizabeth and Todd Harbison had a family incident. What these lawyers were supposed to help with a portion of us dealing with our father passing away during those moments in the beginning, we had a lawyer 🕵🏼‍♀️ who was wonderful saying that he wanted to get to work and help us out to the best of his ability unfortunately this process is taken extremely long longer than it should of. Almost 2 years to be exact. For a case that should’ve been in solvent. Not only that we stated possibly going after the house, unfortunately we decided not to but we did pay over $1000 for a retainer. only a retainer to start that process and after we decided not to and didn’t go anywhere with that process, they still kept that thousand plus dollars without even asking what else they could possibly do for us. Now here we are at the end and we are fed up. We are displeased because my Uncle Tod is the one that’s paying them the money and yet my Aunt is the only one listed as the client the issue is all three of us are the clients regardless if her name is on it or not because my uncle is paying for it. Yet when he had things to say or was frustrated with the process, they told him “you are not the client” and again this is the man that’s paying them thousands apon thousands of dollars. So when we ask for the final bill my uncle asked for that money that was not used to be taken off that final bill, which I think is respectable to ask since we never used it , chased or did anything for the house. They said they used all that money all 1000+ dollars over something we never even started. So this is my review and soon my aunt and my uncle are also going to write a review and then my family has been very invested in this whole situation will also write reviews. I hope this review helps people see the terrible experience and rip off we had. You will see other reviews reflecting the same but maybe even more information soon. Will this law firm make it right? Doubt it. They will also try to say “we did not represent this person and strongly dispute it” which is a problem within itself since I was involved with every single aspect and was at every court session. All we asked was to give back the money that was in fact not used up.

I have been a real estate investor for five decades and have been a principal in over 100 closings.  Bauer Gravel Farnham is the home of the most unprofessional attorney behavior I have ever witnessed.
During the closing, I notified the attorney of a mistake in the closing document, erroneously debiting me $1700 and giving that money to her clients.  The attorney, Amber Thibault, a partner in the firm, acknowledged the mistake and said that it was her assistant’s error.  Instead of having the error corrected, the attorney ignored my protestations, and I reluctantly signed the incorrect closing statement so as not to jeopardize the closing.
I am out $1700 thanks to this travesty of justice.
Be wary of this firm.
I have filed a formal complaint with the Professional Review Board.
reviews.ownerResponse: We did not represent this person, and we strongly dispute his statements.

reviews.text: Closed my house with them which was subpar - got a call from the real estate manager the night before closing asking where the wire is after I sent it 24 hours prior (ended up fine - it was there). Then I ask for a consultation a month or so later on a different topic & get refused any service. Wouldn't do anything with them again - poor performance all around.

Bauer Gravel Farnham will over-promise, under-deliver and then charge you extra for it. Do not work with Bauer Gravel Farnham, LLP. They will cost you time and money beyond what they initially quoted.

These folks were fantastic until they weren't.   They overlooked at close a Homestead Property Tax refund that resulted in thousands of dollars lost.  Vermont statutes state these refunds go to the sellers. A simple escrow fund would have taken care of this. It took months to get answers and several flippant  remarks along the way.  There advice given was simply to sue the new buyers or complete a withdrawal which would have doubled the $ lost.  They didn't even provide a link on how to sue if I had chosen that path. (not)  They took absolutely zero responsibility for their oversight and didn't so much as offer and apology for their obvious mistake.  Sadly , I would give them negative 5 stars based on my experience.

Our experience with this firm was terrible. They were very unprofessional and remarkably poor communicators. We were clients of theirs until one day they decided to dump us due to circumstances they could not articulate nor keep straight, offering stuttering excuses that contradicted one another. Steer clear of this firm, they are only after the big bucks and the notoriety of richer clients.

My husband and I closed on our first home and Nick made the closing process a breeze. With how much jargon is in the stack of closing documents, it was very helpful to have someone explain each one. He also made it very clear that if anything comes up, not to hesitate to reach out and ask questions going forward. We recommend Nick for your homebuying legal needs!
Have had many closings here. They are friendly, efficient, and prompt. I would recommend them highly.
Extrodinarily knowledgeable and easy to work with. Their team is unmatched; you will be happy you chose them to represent you.

John Riley helped me with a messy quitclaim writeup and was retained while I sold land. He rose above and beyond my expectations, leaving me full of gratitude for his knowledge and actions. I truly feel I found the best real estate attorney in the area, and regardless of where he practices law, he will be the best attorney in the area. I highly recommend John!

This an attorney service that is quite involved with the people they serve.
On visits to their offices, they were always friendly and attentive.  There was no waiting, no sitting nervously shuffling in a chair for a time: they take care of business in a completely professional way, and quickly, too.  Gloria Rice, although very busy, took the time to call me and keep me abreast on my needs.  I will keep these folks in my corner for my legal needs.  I highly recommend them.
Mr Gordon  very  grateful  trademark attorney

Gordon Troy and Lawrence Stanley is not only a formidable legal team, but two men who care deeply about his clients. I can't say enough about their masterful guidance and knowledge. A seamless pair, the energy and chemistry with which they work together is nothing less than magical.
reviews.ownerResponse: Having awesome clients like you make what we do exhilarating. Thank you for your support.

reviews.text: Gordon and Lawrence were recommended by a old friend and college.  They were very professional and timely and brought me some calmness to a stressful situation. The outcome they negotiated was better then I thought it could be.  I highly recommend calling them before calling anyone else.  They are the best!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words about our practice. It is always a great pleasure to hear that our dedicated team is serving our clients well and to exceed their expectations. We were pleased that we were able to bring about a prompt and satisfactory settlement in your situation. We look forward to serving you again for any future needs.

reviews.text:
There is going to be some point in your life where you will need legal representation, I didn’t think I ever would. The details of the proceedings are not as important as the amazing combination of large firm professionalism combined with small firm personal service offered by Gordon Troy and his firm. I went in to my situation knowing I was right and facing pretty insurmountable odds despite the fact that I was.
Gordon and his team represented me perfectly, honestly and professionally from wire to wire in a case where both my integrity and livelihood were being called into question. We have heard the expression “prove it in court” this is exactly what his team did. I left the proceedings with both my integrity and my career intact all because of the amazing job done by this firm. In hindsight it was the firm that made a difference, Gordon faced off against a very large firm with a very large budget and, quite frankly, via superior grasp of the law and the positioning of appropriate experts won my case.
The best part is, I’m addition to being a great attorney, Gordon is a good person too.
If you need legal representation and you appreciate integrity and a firm grasp of the law look know further, Gordon Troy is the best!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your wonderful recommendation and review. We strive to represent our clients and provide favorable outcomes.

reviews.text: Have used Gordon for many years and am very happy with his service. Would definitely recommend him.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words about our practice. Working with you and your company for all these years has truly been a privilege, and we look forward to your continuing success and doing everything we can to assist.
Thank you for the review!

reviews.text: My wife and I recently worked with Bryce Wing to buy our first home. Bryce helped us understand confusing deeds and easements to our property and helped us consider aspects of the contract that we wouldn't have thought of without his counsel. Bryce was also generous with his time to understand what our goals were and translate our intent into a contract. We highly recommend working with Bryce for real estate matters.

As a local Realtor in the Upper Valley, I highly Bryce Wing to both my buyers and sellers. His prompt responsiveness, attention to detail, client-centric approach, and dedication to facilitating seamless transactions make him a top choice. Plus, his humor and jokes at the closing table are an enjoyable bonus!
Bryce and the crew are too rate!! Highly recommend them!!

Barry Schuster was extremely helpful, professional, kind and capable. I worked with him on a variance case here in Lebanon and he was responsive to inquiries, took time to explain things carefully and thoughtful about what to do and why. He was upfront about costs and billed very reasonably. I can't recommend him highly enough.
So grateful that people like Marc exist.

Helped me tremendously in my case. Took the time to talk and really engage with me on my situation. Was very respectful, honest, and determined to truly help my cause. I would recommend his law firm to anyone in need of the services he offers.
Marc is an amazing guy willing to help anyone gives awesome legal advise. If your looking for a real go getter give him a call.

If I could give Marc a higher rating I’d give him 10+ stars.  We retained his services to aid in a wrongful eviction case and he went above and beyond our expectations.  We cannot thank him enough for his help.  He will be our first choice if we ever need him again.

Great fighter for good people. One of the top 5 lawyers I've ever had the privilege of knowing.

Give him a call!!!!!

I called Marc’s office number, he answered right away and thoroughly helped to walk me through the answers to each of my questions. I HIGHLY RECOMMEND this gentleman, and I look forward to his assistance with my future needs. Thanks Marc!!!
Marc is extremely knowledgeable and generous with his time.  Marc explains issue in an easily digestible manner. We enjoyed working with him.

Marc Nemeth is knowledgeable, direct, professional and compassionate. His legal expertise and experience allow him to quickly understand the issue at hand and craft the best strategic plan forward. Marc's command of the law, collaborative work style and enterprising mindset make him stand out in a crowded field of lawyers.

If you don't judge a book by its cover and give moments to learn an individual you may leave with more than an attorney you may leave with a very intelligent friend! Marc's not just an attorney he puts his emotions into his clients. That's rare isn't it?
Marc is an absolute legend! If you need a lawyer that knows how to get things done and to take care of you he is your guy!

Attorney Nemeth is an excellent listener, he grasps the situation and takes command. He has helped me and my family over the years and we are grateful for him. If you have need of a lawyer call him and he will take care of you.

Marc helped me try to come to a conclusion on an issue I wasnt sure about. His information was direct and informative, and im thankful that I was able to get his advice.
Much appreciated!

Marc Nemeth handled our real estate closing with agility and comprehensiveness. He made sure everything happened smoothly. He's a conscientious attorney who sees problems before they happen, and solves them.

All i have to say is wow! I've never had an attorney take such a personal interest in making sure me and my family were protected and treated fairly by all parties involved, which we were thanks to Marc ! To the point with a heart of gold, I'd recommend him to anyone! Thanks again Marc!

We were refered to Marc through a friend while dealing with a situation concerning the house we were living in. From the moment he picked up the phone he had our best interest in mind. Taking a stressful housing situation where we felt pressured to leave immediately and turning it into a more leasurly process where time and resources were on our side. We went from not knowing what to do, to being able to take our move step by step with ease. I don't know what our family would have done with out Marcs help. He worked with us every step of the way including after we moved to make sure we recieved our Security. Thank you Marc Nemeth! You are the greatest!
Mark handled the closing my house sale. He walked me through a fairly complex process and made it clear and easy and quick. He knows his stuff!
Mark has helped my family and I with legal matters on numerous occasions. He is straight to the point and professional and knowledgeable. I highly recommend Mr. Nemeth
Marc is an all around solid, good guy. He's honest, works hard and is easy to talk to.

Marc was nice at first and then he just left me hanging. No apology after the fact or any words of direction on what to do next, etc. Yes, I was not going to be a paying client (I'm disabled) but customer experience is still experience and still valid.
Marc is fantastic! He is empathic and a true professional. He really works for his clients

I contacted Matt for handling a speeding ticket in VT. I live in NH and was traveling to NY to take care of my 90yr old mother who has dementia. I was stopped by the officer, and he said I was speeding. I did not think I was speeding and decided to fight the ticket. The ticket amount was 5 points on my license and $250.00 fine. Matt handled my case, and he got the ticket dismissed. I couldn't be happier with service Matt provided for my speeding ticket. I would highly recommend Matt for any speeding ticket issues you may have.

I am incredibly grateful for the exceptional service I received from Matthew Hart and his office . From the moment I approached them with my case, they displayed unwavering dedication and professionalism. They took the time to thoroughly understand the nuances of my situation and provided clear guidance every step of the way. Thanks to their expertise and tenacity, my issue was resolved effectively and efficiently. I highly recommend Matthew Hart to anyone in need of legal assistance. Their commitment to their clients is truly commendable!

Matthew helped me with a speeding violation in VT. I don't reside in VT but he clarified the process with me and was super helpful in helping resolve it. Professional, responsive and personable. Highly recommended!
reviews.ownerResponse: Glad I could help! Thank you.

reviews.text: Matt Hart is Awesome. Did a wonderful job for my son who was facing big time. If your in trouble and you need someone to fight for you this is your man. Most lawyers don't do what they are asked, but Matt listened and got us a deal of lifetime. Thanks Matt Hart.

Matt is an amazing attorney, he talked my son through the choices he makes in life and responsibilities  he has to assume when making those choices. He took the time and care with his case and we had a good outcome. Highly recommend!!
The best lawyer in town

I am so happy I hired Mr. Hart; I was told to never go at it alone in a DUI case BOY people were right!!!
I was advised to seek Mr. Hart's advice and counseling. It has been the best advice I have gotten in a long time. It took a long time to get the case resolved but it was covid NOT Attorney Hart that caused the delay.
He always got back to me in a timely matter, always listened to my concerns and problems (some not even about the case) I cannot emphasize enough that I would hire this man if you needed to.
